nasb.text: Before the decree takes effect— The day passes like the chaff— Before the burning anger of the Lord comes upon you, Before the day of the Lord’s anger comes upon you.

esv.text: before the decree takes effect —before the day passes away like chaff— before there comes upon you the burning anger of the Lord, before there comes upon you the day of the anger of the Lord.

cnv.text: 趁命令還沒有發出， 日子還沒有像風前的糠秕一般吹過， 耶和華的烈怒還沒有臨到你們， 耶和華忿怒的日子還沒有臨到你們以前， 你們要聚集起來！
